title: WebFetchResult
description: Output contract from WebFetchTool.fetch_batch(). Contains per-URL FetchedPage results with content or error details.

fetched_count.description: Number of URLs fetched successfully (with usable content).

failed_count.description: Number of URLs that produced an error.

total_ms.description: Total wall-clock time in milliseconds for the batch.

title.description: Extracted <title> content, null if not found.

content.description: Extracted page content in selected output_format.

fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the fetch completed.

http_status.description: HTTP response status code; 0 for connection errors.

processing_ms.description: Milliseconds spent fetching + extracting this page.

error.description: Error message if fetch failed, null on success.
